mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `t_skill_external_catalog_item` (`dedupe_key`, `external_id`, `name`, `summary`, `pack_url`, `license_note`, `source_url`, `stars`, `skill_md`, `skill_md_resolved_url`, `skill_md_truncated`, `sync_batch`) VALUES
(#{e.dedupeKey}, #{e.externalId}, #{e.name}, #{e.summary}, #{e.packUrl}, #{e.licenseNote}, #{e.sourceUrl}, #{e.stars}, #{e.skillMd}, #{e.skillMdResolvedUrl}, #{e.skillMdTruncated}, #{e.syncBatch})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `external_id` = VALUES(`external_id`), `name` = VALUES(`name`), `summary` = VALUES(`summary`), `pack_url` = VALUES(`pack_url`), `license_note` = VALUES(`license_note`), `source_url` = VALUES(`source_url`), `stars` = VALUES(`stars`), `skill_md` = IFNULL(VALUES(`skill_md`), `skill_md`), `skill_md_resolved_url` = IF(VALUES(`skill_md`) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(`skill_md_resolved_url`), `skill_md_resolved_url`), `skill_md_truncated` = IF(VALUES(`skill_md`) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(`skill_md_truncated`), `skill_md_truncated`), `sync_batch` = VALUES(`sync_batch`)

sql.if: AND ( LOWER(`name`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`summary`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(`pack_url`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`source_url`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(`external_id`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`license_note`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND LOWER(IFNULL(`license_note`, '')) NOT LIKE '%skillhub%' AND LOWER(IFNULL(`license_note`, '')) NOT LIKE '%skillsmp%'

mapper.select:
SELECT `dedupe_key`, `external_id`, `name`, `summary`, `pack_url`, `license_note`, `source_url`, `stars`, `skill_md`, `skill_md_resolved_url`, `skill_md_truncated`, `sync_batch`, `create_time`, `update_time` FROM `t_skill_external_catalog_item`
ORDER BY IFNULL(`stars`, 0) DESC, `name` ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
